source:
# ER Juror — Postcode Change Analysis (2025 vs Current Year)

Compares `rec_num + zip` between 2025 baseline CSV and current Delta table.

| Output | Description |
|---|---|
| `la_summary` | LA-level statistics with IQR significance flags |
| `postcode_detail_significant` | Changed postcodes: New / Removed / Count Changed |

from pyspark.sql import functions as F, SparkSession
from notebookutils import mssparkutils

spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

# ── Config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
env             = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName().split("-")[-1]
storage_account = f"baubaisadfsa{env}"
STORAGE         = f"{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net"
CONTAINER_25    = "dl-juror-eric-voters-temp-2025"
CONTAINER_NOW   = "dl-juror-eric-voters-temp"
OUTPUT_BASE     = f"abfss://{CONTAINER_NOW}@{STORAGE}/postcode_analysis"
CHECKPOINT      = f"abfss://{CONTAINER_NOW}@{STORAGE}/checkpoints"
PATH_2025       = f"abfss://{CONTAINER_25}@{STORAGE}/rec_num_vs_zip_25.csv"
PATH_CURRENT    = f"abfss://{CONTAINER_NOW}@{STORAGE}/voters_deduplicated_delta/"
spark.sparkContext.setCheckpointDir(CHECKPOINT)

df_2025 = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("inferSchema", "true")
    .csv(PATH_2025)
)

df_current = (
    spark.read
    .format("delta")
    .load(PATH_CURRENT)
)

print(f"2025 rows:    {df_2025.count():,}")
print(f"Current rows: {df_current.count():,}")

df_2025_clean = (
    df_2025
    .select(
        F.col("rec_num").cast("integer").alias("rec_num"),
        F.upper(F.trim(F.col("zip"))).alias("zip"),
        F.col("count").alias("count_2025")
    )
    .filter(F.col("zip").isNotNull() & F.col("rec_num").isNotNull())
    .dropDuplicates(["rec_num", "zip"])
)
df_current_clean = (
    df_current
    # removed: .filter(F.col("AdtclmnRecordActiveInd") == 1)
    .select(
        F.col("rec_num").cast("integer").alias("rec_num"),
        F.upper(F.trim(F.col("zip"))).alias("zip"),
    )
    .filter(F.col("zip").isNotNull() & F.col("rec_num").isNotNull())
    .groupBy("rec_num", "zip")
    .agg(F.count("*").alias("count_current"))
)
print(f"2025  distinct rec_num+zip: {df_2025_clean.count():,}")
print(f"Current distinct rec_num+zip: {df_current_clean.count():,}")
## Step 3 — Full outer join + classify changes

df_joined = (
    df_2025_clean
    .join(df_current_clean, on=["rec_num", "zip"], how="full_outer")
    .fillna(0, subset=["count_2025", "count_current"])
    .withColumn(
        "change_type",
        F.when(F.col("count_2025")    == 0,                      "New")
         .when(F.col("count_current") == 0,                      "Removed")
         .when(F.col("count_2025")    != F.col("count_current"), "Count Changed")
         .otherwise("Unchanged")
    )
    .withColumn("count_difference", F.col("count_current") - F.col("count_2025"))
    .withColumn("abs_difference",   F.abs(F.col("count_difference")))
## Step 4 — LA-level summary with IQR significance

df_la_summary = (
    df_joined
    .groupBy("rec_num")
    .agg(
        F.sum("count_2025")                                        .alias("total_2025"),
        F.sum("count_current")                                     .alias("total_current"),
        F.count(F.when(F.col("change_type") == "New",           1)).alias("new_postcodes"),
        F.count(F.when(F.col("change_type") == "Removed",       1)).alias("removed_postcodes"),
        F.count(F.when(F.col("change_type") == "Count Changed", 1)).alias("count_changed_postcodes"),
        F.count(F.when(F.col("change_type") == "Unchanged",     1)).alias("unchanged_postcodes"),
    )
    .withColumn("net_change", F.col("total_current") - F.col("total_2025"))
    .withColumn(
        "pct_net_change",
        F.round(
            F.when(F.col("total_2025") > 0,
                F.col("net_change") / F.col("total_2025") * 100
            ).otherwise(0), 2
        )
    )
    .withColumn("abs_pct_change", F.abs(F.col("pct_net_change")))
    .withColumn(
        "change_direction",
        F.when(F.col("net_change") > 0, "Growth")
         .when(F.col("net_change") < 0, "Loss")
         .otherwise("No Change")
    )
)

# IQR outlier detection
q1, q3      = df_la_summary.approxQuantile("pct_net_change", [0.25, 0.75], 0.01)
iqr         = q3 - q1
lower_fence = q1 - (1.5 * iqr)
upper_fence = q3 + (1.5 * iqr)

print(f"Q1: {q1:.2f}%  Q3: {q3:.2f}%  IQR: {iqr:.2f}%")
print(f"Lower fence: {lower_fence:.2f}%  Upper fence: {upper_fence:.2f}%")

df_flagged = (
    df_la_summary
    .withColumn(
        "is_outlier",
        (F.col("pct_net_change") < lower_fence) |
        (F.col("pct_net_change") > upper_fence)
    )
    .withColumn(
        "significance",
        F.when(F.col("abs_pct_change") >= 20, "🔴 Critical")
         .when(F.col("abs_pct_change") >= 10, "🟠 Significant")
         .when(F.col("abs_pct_change") >= 5,  "🟡 Moderate")
         .when(F.col("is_outlier"),            "🔵 Outlier")
         .otherwise("🟢 Normal")
    )
)

print("\nSignificance distribution:")
df_flagged.groupBy("significance").count().orderBy("count").show()
## Step 5 — Build postcode detail (all changes except Unchanged)

df_detail = (
    df_joined
    .filter(F.col("change_type") != "Unchanged")
    .join(
        df_flagged.select("rec_num", "significance", "change_direction"),
        on="rec_num",
        how="left"
    )
    .select(
        "rec_num",
        "zip",
        "change_type",
        "count_2025",
        "count_current",
        "count_difference",
        "abs_difference",
        "significance",
        "change_direction"
    )
    .orderBy("rec_num", F.col("abs_difference").desc())
)

print("Postcode detail breakdown:")
df_detail.groupBy("change_type").count().orderBy("count").show()
print(f"Total changed rows: {df_detail.count():,}")

def write_delta(df, path, name, partitions=None):
    """Write DataFrame to Delta with row count verification."""
    print(f"Writing {name}...")
    df.checkpoint()
    writer = df.repartition(partitions) if partitions else df
    (
        writer.write
        .format("delta")
        .mode("overwrite")
        .option("overwriteSchema", "true")
        .save(path)
    )
    count = spark.read.format("delta").load(path).count()
    print(f"  ✅ {name} — {count:,} rows → {path}")
    return count

write_delta(df_flagged, f"{OUTPUT_BASE}/la_summary",                 "LA summary")
write_delta(df_detail,  f"{OUTPUT_BASE}/postcode_detail_significant", "Postcode detail", partitions=20)

print("\n✅ Analysis complete")

print("Files in postcode_analysis:")
for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"{OUTPUT_BASE}/"):
    print(f"  {f.name:45s} {f.size:>12,} bytes")

print("\nLA summary — top 10 by absolute change:")
(
    spark.read.format("delta")
    .load(f"{OUTPUT_BASE}/la_summary")
    .orderBy(F.col("abs_pct_change").desc())
    .select(
        "rec_num", "total_2025", "total_current",
        "new_postcodes", "removed_postcodes", "count_changed_postcodes",
        "pct_net_change", "significance", "change_direction"
    )
    .show(10, truncate=False)
)

print("\nPostcode detail — top 10 by largest count difference:")
(
    spark.read.format("delta")
    .load(f"{OUTPUT_BASE}/postcode_detail_significant")
    .orderBy(F.col("abs_difference").desc())
    .show(10, truncate=False)
